rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Rundll32 Without a Command Line (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Rundll32 Without a Command Line (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 2a2bd094-ecd0-4b19-afb7-c2547b0bdf30
status: experimental
description: Detects instances of Rundll32 without a command line spawning child processes.
  Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/rundll32/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1218.011
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \rundll32.exe
    ParentCommandLine:
    - rundll32.exe
    - rundll32
    - ''
    - null
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
